app.title: Shooting Logbook
app.description: Track training, matches, firearms, ammunition, maintenance and paperwork locally, with optional Google Drive backup.

privacy.localDevice: Your data stays on this device.

dashboard.title: Dashboard overview
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Your data stays on this device. Back up to Google Drive when sync is enabled.
dashboard.firearmsSummary: Create firearm profiles and track total round counts.
dashboard.trainingSummary: Record training sessions, drills, scores and notes.
dashboard.matchesSummary: Keep match participation and results ready for reporting.
dashboard.syncSummary: Back up data to the user's own Google Drive app data folder.

firearms.title: Firearm registry
firearms.description: Manage firearm profiles, round count starting values and optional sensitive references.
firearms.empty: Add the first profile to start tracking usage.
firearms.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
firearms.sensitiveHelp: These fields stay local and can later be backed up to the user's Google Drive.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.localOnly: Your data stays on this device. Nothing is sent to any server by this app.
privacy.sensitive: Sensitive details are stored locally and only leave your device if you back up to your Google Drive.

data.title: Data management
data.exportDescription: Download a JSON file with all your logbook data.
data.importDescription: Restore from a previously exported JSON file. Existing records with the same IDs will be updated.
data.clearDescription: This will permanently delete all logbook data from this device.
data.importDropHint: or click to choose a JSON backup from this device

about.title: About ShootLog
about.description: ShootLog is a privacy-first logbook for sport shooters. All data is stored locally in your browser using IndexedDB. No app-owned database is required.

clearDialog.title: Clear all data?
clearDialog.description: This permanently removes firearms, training sessions, matches, ammunition, maintenance and paperwork records from this device. This cannot be undone.

owner.title: Device owner
owner.description: Add one identifier or name at a time. Analysis will use these aliases or names to preselect your competitor when a match is opened.

sync.title: Google Drive Sync
sync.description: Connect your Google Drive to back up and restore this local logbook from your own Drive app data folder.
sync.connectedDescription: This browser keeps the current short-lived Drive access token so refreshes do not immediately require reconnecting.
sync.disconnectedDescription: Connect Google Drive to enable backup and restore.
sync.configurationMissingDescription: Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in the environment before using Google Drive sync.
sync.connectDescription: Authorize access only to this app’s hidden Drive data folder.
sync.backupDescription: Upload the current local IndexedDB backup to your Google Drive app data folder.
sync.restoreDescription: Download the backup from Google Drive and import it into this device.
sync.restoreConfirm: Restore data from Google Drive? Existing records with the same IDs will be updated.
sync.noBackupFound: No Google Drive backup was found for this app.
sync.disconnectDescription: Revoke the current browser access token. Your Drive backup is not deleted.
sync.privacyDescription: The app requests only the drive.appdata scope. It can access files created by this app in the hidden Google Drive app data folder, not your full Drive.
sync.storageUsage: Drive app data used: {{size}} across {{count}} file(s)
sync.storageUsageDisconnected: Drive app data used: connect Google Drive to check

paperwork.title: Paperwork
paperwork.description: Track licences, permits, memberships and credentials with expiry reminders.
paperwork.empty: Add licences, permits and credentials to track their expiry.
paperwork.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This document record will be permanently removed.
paperwork.privacyNote: Sensitive paperwork details are stored locally and can be backed up to your Google Drive.

attachments.label: Attached documents
attachments.editHint: After saving, attached scans or PDFs can be managed from the document card.
attachments.dropHint: Drop a PDF or image here, or click to choose a file

training.title: Training sessions
training.description: Log practice sessions and track progress.
training.empty: Log your first training session to start tracking progress.
training.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this training session.

matches.title: Matches
matches.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this match.

practiscore.title: PractiScore import
practiscore.createHint: Import the downloaded CAB file from PractiScore results. A local match will be created from the XML data.
practiscore.replaceHint: Importing while editing replaces the local match data and its PractiScore snapshot.
practiscore.validation: Choose the downloaded PractiScore CAB file.
practiscore.importedSummary: Imported {{stages}} stages, {{competitors}} competitors and {{scores}} stage scores.
practiscore.downloadHelp: From PractiScore results, open the match export/download option and save the CAB package. Import the CAB as-is; do not unzip or edit it.

analysis.title: Match analysis
analysis.description: Select an imported match, including Mare2 matches, and compare one or more competitors across hits, times, points and stage trends.
analysis.competitorPlaceholder: Search by name, alias or number
analysis.pickCompetitor: Choose a competitor from the search field to show the chart.
analysis.stagePlacementDescription: Ranking by stage, calculated from stage hit factor. Closer to #1 is better.
analysis.stageDetailsDescription: Compact per-stage view of course info, hits, penalties, time and hit factor.
analysis.emptyDescription: Import a match from Mare2, Mare2 PDF or PractiScore in Matches, or open a shared Mare2 analysis link.
analysis.sharedImportingDescription: Downloading the public match from the Mare2 catalog and storing it only on this device to open the shared analysis.
analysis.stageDetailsLegend: Hit colors: green Alpha, blue Charlie, amber Delta, red Miss, purple No-shoot, gray Procedure.
analysis.hitDistributionDescription: Breakdown of scored hits and penalties for the selected competitors.
analysis.hitFactorChartDescription: Compares per-stage hit factor; higher values are better.
analysis.timeChartDescription: Compares raw stage time; lower values are better.

mare2.title: Mare2 FITDS PDF import
mare2.createHint: Import score verification PDFs generated by Mare2. Data stays local and becomes available in Analysis.
mare2.replaceHint: Importing a Mare2 PDF while editing replaces this match and its analysis snapshot.
mare2.validation: Choose a Mare2 PDF file to import.
mare2.importError: Unable to import this Mare2 PDF.
mare2.importedSummary: Imported Mare2 PDF: {{stages}} stages · {{competitors}} competitors · {{scores}} scores
mare2.downloadHelp: From Mare2/FITDS results, open “Score Verification By Competitor” and export or print that report to PDF. This parser expects that competitor-by-competitor layout.

import.dropHint: or click to choose it from this device

briefing.title: Import stage images
briefing.description: Attach stage images to {{match}} from a Mare2 match booklet/briefing PDF. After saving, an override file will also be downloaded for reuse in the public catalog.
briefing.dropTitle: Drop the Mare2 match booklet/briefing PDF here
briefing.dropHint: or click to choose the match booklet/briefing PDF
briefing.importError: Unable to import the stage briefing PDF.
briefing.importedSummary: Imported {{count}} stage image(s). Override file downloaded.

publicCatalog.title: Import from Mare2
publicCatalog.description: Search and import one or more prepared public matches. Data will be stored only locally on this device.
publicCatalog.empty: No matches are available in the public catalog.
publicCatalog.loadError: Unable to load the public Mare2 catalog.
publicCatalog.importError: Unable to import the match from the Mare2 catalog.
publicCatalog.searchPlaceholder: Free text: federal ma3, winter, uboldo, 1616...

ammunition.title: Ammunition
ammunition.description: Manage reloading recipes, chronograph measurements and ammunition stock locally.
ammunition.empty: Track your stock, purchases and remaining rounds.
ammunition.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this ammunition entry.

components.title: Components
components.description: Manage reusable bullets, powders, primers and brass for your recipes.

recipes.empty: Create a recipe by selecting one bullet, one powder and the powder charge.

chrono.empty: Record chrono readings for a recipe and firearm to calculate average velocity and power factor.
chrono.readingsPlaceholder:
One or more readings, separated by spaces, commas or new lines
1012
1008
1015

recipes.title: Reloading recipes
recipes.description: Save load recipes with reusable bullets, powders, primers and brass.

chrono.title: Chronograph
chrono.description: Record velocity strings by recipe and firearm to calculate average speed and power factor.

stock.title: Ammunition stock
stock.description: Track ammunition lots, movements and remaining rounds.

components.title: Components
components.description: Manage reusable bullets, powders, primers and brass for your recipes.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Track cleaning, servicing and parts replacements.
maintenance.empty: Log cleanings, services and parts replacements.
maintenance.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this maintenance entry.

importUrl.error: Could not import backup from URL: {{error}}
